meaning: n.塞克尔梨(一种红棕色,甜而多汁的小梨)
examples: Al Seckel takes great delight in visual illusions and the brain mechanics that they reveal.
Cognitive neuroscientist al Seckel explores how eye tricks can reveal the way the brain processes visual information — or fails to do so.
Seckel has designed interactive museum exhibits around the world that allow visitors to play with illusions and understand how they work.
